---
name: 'ADO: Sprint Plan'
description: 'Plan the next team sprint by selecting backlog candidates against team capacity.'
---

Run the sprint planning workflow for the target iteration.

Follow the Sprint Planning workflow in
#file:.github/instructions/ado/ado-backlog-sprint.instructions.md.

1. Retrieve current team iterations and target sprint details.
2. Gather backlog candidates sorted by priority.
3. Check dependencies and flag blocked or under-estimated items.
4. Build a proposed sprint plan against team capacity.
5. Present the plan for approval, then apply iteration path assignments.
6. Store the plan in `.copilot-tracking/workitems/sprint/`.
